title: Forard

'''Forard''' was a town on [[Almas]], and the only large settlement on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was built around the [[Almas Academy]], and had very little besides for basic services and entertainment facilities. The town was built directly upon a patch of [[kaluthin]].<ref name="LFC" />

Forard grew in a circular pattern around the Academy, with one quarter of the circle housing the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and other large facilities. People who were not students or [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were usually not allowed near the Academy, so there was a hole in the center of Forard between the Academy and the rest of the town. A [[Forard research station|research station]] stood just beyond the outskirts of the town.<ref name="LFC" />

The spaceport was just a landing field with minimal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] services available. It originally was capable of handling four starships, but after [[Klis Joo]] became governor, she had [[Bran Isken]] come in and overhaul the spaceport, making it able to handle up to twenty ships.<ref name="LFC" />

Due to the slightly toxic amounts of trace elements and overly rich oxygen in the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of Almas, each building in Forard was sealed and had its own atmospheric controls.<ref name="LFC" />

Forard had about 24,000 inhabitants in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], and a number them had nothing to do with the Academy. As a small town on an out-of-the-way planet, there was a peaceful isolation to Forard that drew certain types of individuals. They were also drawn to the planet's strange lighting caused by the kaluthin.<ref name="LFC" />

There were also a couple thousand [[Droid/Legends|droids]] in Forard. Most of those were treaded, as the kaluthin could hamper other forms of movement. Forard's small police force used a number of [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]], because they were immune to [[Mind trick/Legends|mind tricks]]. It was not that there was a large concern that one of the Jedi students would commit a crime, but [[Kibh Jeen]] had left the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] with a greater awareness of the dangers of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]. Between the security forces and the Jedi, there was almost no obvious crime in Forard. Crimes that do not attract attention, however, were actually easy to perpetrate.<ref name="LFC" />
